meaning: n.成套工具,用具包,工具箱,成套用具
examples: My boyhood hero was Kit Carson.
Christopher is commonly known as Kit.
Make sure you keep a well-stocked first aid kit ready to deal with any emergency.
Cirrus made its start in the 1980s, designing kit airplanes out of a farmhouse in Wisconsin.
These kit-level experiments are harmless, hobbies pursued as much for educational purposes as for ingenuity.
